channel.title: Shift Coordinator on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Burger King as a Shift Coordinator: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A detailed guide to working as a shift coordinator at Burger King, covering pay, responsibilities, pros, cons, and tips from real employees.
